zh.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman於1521年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 安德魯。她於1542年與William Guild在英國英格蘭素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年在英國英格蘭素福爾可維斯塔爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman于1521年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 安德魯。她于1542年与William Guild在英国英格兰素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年在英国英格兰素福爾可維斯塔爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Flatman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Middle English flat ‘level ground, plain’ (Old Scandinavian flatr) + -man, for someone who lived on a flat piece of land. Compare Flatt .

variants.name: Flatt
meanings: English (mainly East Anglia): topographic name for someone who lived on a flat, a patch of level or low-lying ground, from Middle English flat ‘level ground, plain’ (Old Norse flatr).

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman was born in 1521, in Ilketshall St Andrew, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married William Guild in 1542, in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1588, in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

it.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman è nata il nel 1521 nel Ilketshall St Andrew, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William Guild nel 1542, nel Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1588, nel Westhall, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose Flatmanは1521年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイルケトシャル スト アンドリューで生まれた。1542年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイルケトシャル スト マーガレットでWilliam Guildと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエスサルで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman(은)는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 앤드루에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿에서 William Guild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웨스솔에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman nasceu em 1521, em Ilketshall St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com William Guild em 1542, em Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1588, em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman родилась в 1521 г. в местности илкецхолл ст андрю, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Guild в 1542 г. в местности илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1588 г. в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rose Flatman nació en 1521, en Ilketshall St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William Guild en 1542, en Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1588, en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
